command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $head=(git rev-parse HEAD).Trim(); $remote=(git rev-parse origin/main).Trim(); if ($head -ne $remote) { throw 'HEAD not synced with origin/main' }; if ($head -ne 'f8b09fe4a33b8b43a17bc988c8b0cb1f5cfd09a5') { throw 'unexpected pushed anchor' }; $dirty=(git status --porcelain=v1); if ($dirty) { throw 'workspace not clean before post-push receipt' }; Write-Output ('PASS pushed_anchor=' + $head)"
cannot_claim: semantic correctness of the tested behavior
receipt authenticity: every field is fabricatable by a direct writer
